{{CargoRelic
|name=Patriotic Family Medal
|class_id=20405
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=What is the greatest crisis in modern society? Aging population and declining birthrate! A country full of elderlies faces stagnation, so, boosting the birth rate is a high priority! Let's have more kids running on the street!
|fame=30
|art=12
|fth=20
|civ=13
|tech=15
|ss1=Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +2<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +4<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Minions Cloned, Snail DEF +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
